title: ウクライナ ロシアへの長距離攻撃担う司令部創設へ

title: ベネズエラ大地震 “パンケーキクラッシュ”相次ぐ 専門家
snippet: 南米ベネズエラで先月起きた大地震について、現地で調査にあたっている専門家チームは、NHKの取材に対し、建物がほぼ垂直に崩れる「パンケーキクラッシュ」が相次いだと指摘しました。軟弱な地盤や強度不足が原因…

title: 日本ではホルムズ海峡を通らない代替ルートでの原油調達が進む
snippet: 政府はホルムズ海峡が事実上、封鎖されて以降、ホルムズ海峡を通らないルートでの原油の調達、代替調達を進めていて、原油の輸入量の減少幅は縮小傾向にあります。

title: 米大統領専用機めぐる報道で記者に召喚状 新聞社は非難

title: 首都モスクワでもガソリン不足で行列 ロシア政府に危機感も
snippet: ロシアではウクライナによる石油精製施設への攻撃でガソリンの供給不足が起きていて、首都モスクワでは人々から不満の声も出ています。エネルギー政策担当のロシアの副首相は「状況は依然として厳しい」と述べ、危機…

title: アマゾン先住民族利用の植物 気候変動で3割減のおそれ
snippet: 世界最大の熱帯雨林、南米のアマゾンでは気候変動による気温の上昇などの影響で先住民族が薬や食料として利用してきた植物のおよそ3割が失われる可能性があるとの分析結果を、スイスの研究グループが発表しました。

title: ベネズエラ地震 死者4333人に ベネズエラ議会議長明らかに
snippet: 南米ベネズエラで先月発生した大地震について、ベネズエラ議会のロドリゲス議長は11日、これまでに4333人の死亡が確認されたと明らかにしました。

title: 中朝の条約調印65年 祝電や会談で伝統的友好と結束を確認
snippet: 中国と北朝鮮は、有事の際に軍事援助を行うことなどを定めた条約の調印から11日で65年となるのにあわせて、習近平国家主席とキム・ジョンウン（金正恩）総書記が祝電を交わしたほか、首相どうしが会談し、伝統的…

title: ベネズエラ大地震 死者4000人超に 日本の緊急援助隊が活動
snippet: 南米ベネズエラで先月起きた大地震は発生から半月余りで死者が4000人を超え、今も行方が分からない人の捜索が続けられています。被害が特に深刻なラ・グアイラ州では日本の国際緊急援助隊が拠点を設け、医療支援…

title: US insists Strait of Hormuz is open as it exchanges strikes with Iran
snippet: Iranian forces earlier said the Strait was closed and launched wide-ranging attacks at US allies and bases in the region.

title: US senator and close Trump ally Lindsey Graham dies after 'brief and sudden illness'
snippet: Donald Trump pays tribute to the 71-year-old South Carolina senator, calling him a "true American patriot" who will be "greatly missed".

title: Badly burned British couple rescued from ravine during Spain wildfires, reports say
snippet: The unnamed pair were found semi-conscious with 40% burns after being trapped by the blazes raging through Almeria province, local media reports.

title: China evacuates nearly two million people as powerful typhoon makes landfall
snippet: Schools, work and outdoor activities have been suspended in Zhejiang province and many transport services cancelled.

title: Former Emir of Qatar Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani dies aged 74
snippet: He took power in 1996 after staging a bloodless coup against his father, and went on to transform Qatar into the gas-rich power it is today.

title: T. rex could become most expensive fossil ever - but it's a ​problem for scientists
snippet: A 67 million-year-old Tyrannosaurus rex will go on sale in New York with a pre-sale value of $30m.

title: David Willey, esteemed BBC Vatican correspondent, dies aged 93
snippet: One of the BBC's longest-serving foreign correspondents, he reported on five popes during his career.

title: At least two killed in Toronto street festival shooting
snippet: Police say there was an exchange of gunfire between two individuals at the festival, and two firearms had been recovered from the scene.

title: Muslim judge in India faces death threats after convicting 'cow vigilantes'
snippet: Tabassum Khan has been facing online abuse after convicting 14 Hindu men in a lynching case.

title: Polish PM pledges memorial to victims of WW2 'genocide by Ukrainian nationalists'
snippet: Warsaw and Kyiv have for decades been at loggerheads over the killings of many thousands of civilians during World War Two.

title: US Democrat Ro Khanna says he was detained by armed Israeli settlers
snippet: Khanna, 49, was visiting the occupied West Bank when he was held for 90 minutes, he says.

title: Trump administration subpoenas New York Times journalists over Air Force One reporting
snippet: The reporters received the legal summons after they reported on alleged security issues with the president's new plane, which was gifted by Qatar.

title: South Africa World Cup midfielder Adams dies aged 25
snippet: South Africa and Mamelodi Sundowns midfielder Jayden Adams dies at the age of 25, just weeks after featuring for his country at the World Cup.

title: More than 40 kidnapped children and teachers freed after Nigerian army operation
snippet: "I feel happy and elated… I feel joy," the head of the local teachers' union tells the BBC.

title: Indian tourists among 15 killed as speedboat capsizes in Vietnam
snippet: Local media say 21 people were saved after the boat overturned in rough seas near an island in south Vietnam.

title: ウクライナ軍 ロシア中部の大規模な石油精製施設を攻撃

title: 仏猛暑 水の事故の犠牲者130人超 イベントなどにも影響
snippet: 猛暑が続いているフランスでは、先月19日以降、水の事故による死者が130人を超えたほか、エッフェル塔などの観光名所が営業時間を短縮するなど影響が広がっています。

title: ベネズエラ大地震 被害の実態把握なお課題
snippet: 南米ベネズエラで先月に起きた大地震は、捜索が難航するなか、死者が増え続けていて、確認された死者は4400人を超えました。建物の被害は政府の発表を大きく上回るという推計もあり、国際社会から支援を受けるた…

title: タイ バンコクの飲食店で火災 AP通信“少なくとも27人が死亡”

title: At least 27 killed in Bangkok bar fire
snippet: Firefighters arrived at the scene in the Chatuchak district to find patrons running through blasting flames to escape.

title: South Africa says more than 53,000 foreigners deported in migration campaign
snippet: South Africa is cracking down on undocumented migrants following widespread anti-immigration protests.
